channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Watch: Fans boo US national anthem at NHL game in Canada
item.description: The booing came shortly after Trump signed an order imposing stiff tariffs on imports from Canada, Mexico, and China.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: DeWanna Bonner will join the Indiana Fever, AP source says
item.description: DeWanna Bonner is headed to Indiana to join Caitlin Clark and the Fever, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Sunday. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity because no official announcement has been made.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gabriel goads Haaland after goal in Arsenal-Man City match in latest chapter of their spiky rivalry
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Arsenal defender Gabriel didn't waste his chance to get his own back on Manchester City striker Erling Haaland.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Why Bobby Hurley was half right for having Arizona State avoid handshakes after loss to Arizona
item.description: Hurley ordered his players off the court to avoid a conflagration after BJ Freeman head-butted Arizona's Caleb Love.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: SF Giants, Sacramento fans try to make sense of A’s stadium juggle as Manfred lauds ballpark progress
item.description: The Giants players at FanFest on Saturday were excited for the people of Sacramento, but much work remains before Opening Day as the scoreboard, the batter's eye and parts of the outfield wall were missing.
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: Luka Doncic heads to the Lakers and Anthony Davis goes to the Mavs in blockbuster trade
item.description: Luka Doncic led Dallas to the NBA Finals last season. Anthony Davis won a championship with the Los Angeles Lakers. They have switched teams now — in an absolute blockbuster. Doncic has been traded by the reigning Western Conference champion Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers for Davis.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Man United loses to Crystal Palace as Rashford edges toward departure. Tottenham beats Brentford
item.description: On the day Marcus Rashford edged closer to a departure from Old Trafford, Manchester United lacked a cutting edge up front in a 2-0 home loss to Crystal Palace in the Premier League.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ohtani's return to pitching could come in May for World Series champion Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani pitching for the Los Angeles Dodgers in May is "about right,” manager Dave Roberts said Saturday at the team's annual fan fest. He reiterated that Ohtani won't pitch in the season-opening Japan Series against the Chicago Cubs on March 18-19 in Tokyo.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Kevin Durant says teams aren't held to same 'loyalty' expectations as players are after stunning NBA trade
item.description: After what may just be the most stunning and star-powered trade ever, Kevin Durant called out teams for their lack of loyalty to their players.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What to know as former Spain soccer official Rubiales goes on trial for unsolicited kiss of player
item.description: MADRID (AP) — The former president of the Spanish soccer federation goes on trial Monday accused of sexual assault for kissing forward Jenni Hermoso after Spain’s victory at the Women’s World Cup final in 2023.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trades involving the Capitals, Kings and Jets have worked out for all three teams, an NHL rarity
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Rarely in the NHL does a significant trade work out for both teams involved. Even scarcer is a pair of high-profile moves made over back-to-back summers helping every team involved get better.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What to know about security measures at the Super Bowl in New Orleans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — After a New Year's Day attack struck at the heart of the French Quarter, officials in New Orleans say they are confident in the security plans they have in place for the Super Bowl. Upwards of 125,000 visitors are expected to converge on the Big Easy beginning Feb.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: David Benavidez dominates David Morell with unanimous decision win to unify light heavyweight title
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — David Benavidez unified the light heavyweight championship by earning a unanimous decision over challenger David Morrell on Saturday night to keep his interim WBC belt and win the WBA title.
item.dc:creator: W.G. RAMIREZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Calipari gets lukewarm response in return to Kentucky as Arkansas coach
item.description: LEXINGTON, Ky (AP) — John Calipari received a mixed reception on his return to Rupp Arena on Saturday night, then got the last laugh when his Arkansas Razorbacks beat No. 12 Kentucky 89-79. “It’s hard to win in here.
item.dc:creator: KEITH TAYLOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James has a triple-double and another win at Madison Square Garden as Lakers beat Knicks
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — LeBron James had 33 points, 12 assists and 11 rebounds in his 10th triple-double of the season, enjoying another memorable night at Madison Square Garden and leading the Los Angeles Lakers to a 128-112 victory over the New York Knicks on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Chiefs assistant coach Eric Bieniemy returns to NFL after one season at UCLA: report
item.description: Eric Bieniemy last held a position on an NFL coaching staff in 2023 when he was the Washington Commanders' assistant head coach and offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Despite Alex Ovechkin scoring his 877th goal, the Capitals lose to the Jets 5-4 in overtime
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Alex Ovechkin scored the 877th goal of his career to move 18 away from breaking the NHL record, but the Washington Capitals lost 5-4 in overtime to the Winnipeg Jets on Saturday night in a showdown of the top two teams in the NHL that lived up to that billing.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Self goes for comic relief after No. 11 Kansas blows biggest lead in loss in program history
item.description: WACO, Texas (AP) — Kansas blowing the biggest lead in a loss in the storied program's history didn't cost coach Bill Self his sense of humor.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Welcome to the Madhouse: NASCAR hits tiny Bowman Gray Stadium for rough-and-tumble racing
item.description: WINSTON-SALEM, N.C. (AP) — Ryan Blaney was a little kid the first time he raced at Bowman Gray Stadium — he figures he couldn't have been older than 10 — and remembers it being the coolest thing he'd ever done in motorsports.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
